Petition For Approval Of Contingency Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-14-2020 Advanced From Nov-23-20 To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-14-2020 Advanced From Nov-23-20 To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Contingency Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Don Dowling appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it does not think it is prepared to approve the contingency fee agreement after the fact as requested. Mr. Dowling stated that the error was all his, that the Petitioner is the sole Beneficiary and he didn't think to go and get pre-approval, and that he believes if he had made an application at the time Sophia was considering retaining them given the circumstances, he believes the Court would have granted it. Mr. Dowling also stated that it was a quiet tile action that was not in the estate's name, and that the estate nor Sophia had any funds to pay for litigation. The Court stated that it's not only the issue of timing, but also the issue of whether the amount is appropriate. Mr. Dowling stated that the property was the only asset in the estate, that if they had not prevailed, there wouldn't be anything in the estate and there wasn't going to be anything, and that they advanced the filing fee. The Court asked Mr. Dowling if he has any time sheets. Mr. Dowling stated that he doesn't keep track of time of his contingency fees, that he had communication with several parties, that he reviewed thousands of pages of documents, that he interviewed parties and that he worked really hard on this. The Petition for Approval of Contingency Fee Agreement, and the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. are under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
